modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Guest user unable to access USD Microsoft Teams site.

full_description_text: A guest user is experiencing difficulties accessing a USD Microsoft Teams site. They have received a message indicating a problem with signing in. The login attempt appears to hang without any progress. This issue is occurring for a user outside of USD who has been invited to the site.
short_description: Guest user unable to access USD Microsoft Teams site.
description: A guest user is experiencing difficulties accessing a USD Microsoft Teams site. They have received a message indicating a problem with signing in. The login attempt appears to hang without any progress. This issue is occurring for a user outside of USD who has been invited to the site.
